name: IsExpression
description: Evaluate one or more boolean expressions on the DataFrame rows.

fields.name: expressionNames
fields.title: Rule Name
fields.description: A short identifier for each expression (e.g., AdultCheck, ValidEmail, PositiveBalance).

fields.name: expressions
fields.title: Expression
fields.description: Boolean Spark SQL expressions to evaluate (must return true/false). Example: age >= 18, email RLIKE '^[^@]+@[^@]+\\.[^@]+', coalesce(balance,0) >= 0

fields.name: weightage
fields.title: Weightage
fields.description: Weightage applied to the Data Quality score.
